sections.paragraph:
(compare צָדָה), to lie in wait for, with an acc., specially-

(1) to hunt wild beasts, Gen 27:3, Gen 27:5, 33 Gen 27:33 Job 38:39.

(2) to catch birds, to lay snares, Lev 17:13 metaph. used of snares laid for men, Lam 3:52 4:18 Mic 7:2 Psa 140:12 Pro 6:26 Syr. ܨܘܕ is also to fish; see צִידֹון .

Pilel, i.q. Kal to lay snares, Eze 13:18, 20 Eze 13:20.

Hithpael הִצְטַיֵּד denom. from צַיִד No. 3, to furnish oneself with victuals, Jos 9:12. Aramean אִזְדְּוַד id.

Derivatives, צַיִד, צַיָּד, מְצָד, מָצֹוד, מָצוּד, מְצֹודָה, מְצוּדָה [צֵידָה, pr.n. צִידֹון].
